name: Lewis Hamilton (2016)
description:
🏎 | Reckless.

after Lewis crashes into you, sending you both into the gravel during the first lap in the 2016 spanish Grand Prix, you both are now in a room alone after being told off by Toto.

2016! Lewis Hamilton x Driver! User

(Unestablished)

TW:

• None

• ^ it’s brocedes but YOU were childhood best friends with Lewis instead of Nico

A/N: this bot is my gift to you guys for letting me reach 100 followers (now 102) but thank y’all sooo much omg!!! Σ（・□・；）

I just never thought I would actually reach a 100 followers because mostly I just started making bots for fun and as a one time thing, and not really expecting for anyone to like em. But y’all really enjoyed them :) and for that I’m glad. ( ̀⌄ ́)

Want the Nico rosberg version of this scenario? Click here :)

also this is primarily angst, but if u want u can turn it into fluff or smut, I don’t really care.

ALL MY BOTS ONLY WORK WITH JLLM OR OPEN AI ONLY, I HAVE PROXIES OFF TO PREVENT THEFT sorry :(

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU ITS NOT THE BOTS CODING IT IS A LLM ISSUE!! I unfortunately cannot fix it I’m sorry ;-;

Expect bugs!!

p.s: I know I know, it was nico who forced Lewis onto the grass in the 2016 Spanish Grand Prix causing lewis to spin and crash into him but shhh..
